briefs.title: Railway safety rules updated in BC — new heat and fire risk rules added, effective January 15, 2026
briefs.summary: BC updated its Railway Safety Adopted Provisions Regulation, replacing three outdated rail operating rules with newer versions and adding a new rule covering extreme heat and wildfire risk mitigation for railways, effective January 15, 2026.
briefs.action_required: If you operate a railway in BC, review and comply with the updated rules by January 15, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC updated railway safety rules and new heat/fire risk rule take effect
